description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a minimalist design, featuring four straight legs and a flat tabletop. The front side of the desk includes two drawers, one in a light pink color and the other in a deep red, providing both storage and a visual accent. The rest of the desk is finished in a rich brown wood tone, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The drawers are seamlessly integrated into the front, with no visible handles, maintaining a clean and streamlined look. The sides and back of the desk are plain, with no additional features or ornamentation. The overall construction appears sturdy and suitable for everyday use in a variety of settings.
description: A modern wooden desk with two colored front drawers and a clean, minimalist design. The desk features a rich brown finish and straight legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers, one pink and one red, set into a brown wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the desk's narrow profile and plain brown wooden side.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain brown wooden back with no drawers or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the desk's slim side profile.
attribute_orientation: The side with the two colored drawers is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the plain side is the back.
